name: Almond Cream Spritz/Cookie Press
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat butter and cream cheese in a large mixing bowl until combined.
2. Add sugar, almond extract, and vanilla; beat until combined.
3. Mix in flour. Cover and chill dough for 30 minutes or until easily worked but not too stiff.
4. Pack dough into a cookie press.
5. Force dough through the press onto an ungreased cookie sheet.
6. Bake at 375°F (190°C) for 8 to 10 minutes, or until edges of cookies are firm but not brown.
7. Remove cookies and cool on wire racks.
Makes about 60 cookies.
